scripts.build: babel --extensions ".ts" src --out-dir dist && mkdir -p dist/download0/img dist/download0/audio dist/download0/payloads && cp -r src/download0/img/* dist/download0/img/ && cp -r src/download0/audio/* dist/download0/audio/ && cp src/download0/config.json src/download0/dummy_psn.json.aes src/download0/serve.js.aes dist/download0/ && cp src/download0/payloads/elfldr.elf src/download0/payloads/fake-signin.bin dist/download0/payloads/
